subject: Migrate Portal to unprivileged user
commit_message:
Migrate Portal to unprivileged user

File "{{ .Values.persistence.aafCredsPath }}/mycreds.prop" has to be
writable for clearing credentials after their use during main container
start.

Issue-ID: PORTAL-849
Change-Id: Ic7f8752baf8f87d2747abc7d654f53344ff350f9
Signed-off-by: Pawel Wieczorek <p.wieczorek2@samsung.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 2: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds

Patch Set 1:

Suffix "-STAGING-latest" in image names should be dropped prior merging this patch.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

I've noticed it's just WIP but:

* portal pods are OK
* portal HC is OK
* portal pods are not in root pods list (https://gating-results.onap.eu/results//105240-1/security/root_pods/root_pods.log)
* code addition is also OK on my side

So, except the "STAGING" part, it's very good!

Thanks for the help!

Patch Set 1:

I rebased this change locally on recent master branch (which includes AAF template migration). It no longer requires additional InitContainers - it is just an image version bump now.

I won't push it until Portal 3.2.0 (without "-STAGING-latest" suffix) is available in Nexus in order not to lock resources on Gating.

Patch Set 1:
